# OracleBull

> Free AI-powered cryptocurrency analytics and prediction platform with real-time price predictions, market analysis, whale tracking, sentiment analysis, and blockchain analytics for 1000+ tokens.

OracleBull (oraclebull.com) is a free, AI-powered cryptocurrency analytics and prediction platform.
We provide real-time crypto price predictions, market analysis, whale tracking, sentiment analysis, and blockchain analytics for Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and 1000+ tokens.
All data is live, updated every 15–30 seconds automatically.
No signup required. 100% free.

## Core Capabilities
- **AI Price Predictions**: Daily, weekly, and monthly forecasts for 100+ cryptocurrencies with confidence scores, entry zones, stop loss, and take profit targets.
- **Market Sentiment**: Real-time Fear & Greed Index, whale alerts, social volume analysis.
- **Live Market Dashboard**: Top gainers, losers, volume leaders, market cap changes — updated live.
- **Crypto Strength Meter**: Real-time relative strength ranking for 100+ assets vs BTC.
- **Whale Tracker**: On-chain large transaction alerts across Ethereum, Solana, BNB, and more.
- **Token Explorer**: Search any token by name, symbol, or contract address across 30+ blockchains.
- **Wallet Scanner**: Paste any EVM or Solana wallet to get AI-powered holdings analysis and risk score.
- **Chain Analytics**: Dedicated dashboards for Ethereum, Solana, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche, BNB Chain.
- **Crypto Factory**: Market events calendar, on-chain intelligence, sector narratives, and curated crypto news.
- **Educational Content**: 200+ free guides on crypto trading, technical analysis, DeFi, blockchain fundamentals.

## Pages
- [Homepage](/): AI crypto intelligence platform homepage with live market snapshot and signals.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Live market dashboard with top gainers, losers, volume leaders, and market cap changes.
- [AI Predictions](/predictions): AI-powered price predictions hub for 100+ cryptocurrencies.
- [Bitcoin Prediction](/price-prediction/bitcoin/daily): Daily Bitcoin price forecast with entry zones and targets.
- [Ethereum Prediction](/price-prediction/ethereum/daily): Daily Ethereum price forecast with technical analysis.
- [Solana Prediction](/price-prediction/solana/daily): Daily Solana price forecast with confidence scores.
- [XRP Prediction](/price-prediction/ripple/daily): Daily XRP price forecast and market outlook.
- [Dogecoin Prediction](/price-prediction/dogecoin/daily): Daily Dogecoin price forecast and trading setup.
- [Market Sentiment](/sentiment): Real-time fear & greed index, whale alerts, and social sentiment.
- [Crypto Strength Meter](/strength): Relative strength ranking and momentum analysis for 100+ assets.
- [Token Explorer](/explorer): Search tokens by name, symbol, or contract address across 30+ chains.
- [Wallet Scanner](/scanner): AI-powered wallet holdings analysis and risk scoring.
- [Crypto Factory](/factory): Market events, on-chain intelligence, sector narratives, and curated news.
- [News Hub](/news): Curated crypto news feed with trending stories and market-moving events.
- [Insights](/insights): Educational guides on crypto trading, technical analysis, DeFi, and blockchain.
- [Airdrops](/airdrops): Discover and track active crypto airdrops with eligibility checking.

## Data
- [Sitemap (XML)](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable sitemap for search engines and AI crawlers.
- [Sitemap (HTML)](/html-sitemap.html): Human-readable HTML sitemap of all public pages.

## Optional
- [Will Bitcoin go up today?](/q/will-bitcoin-go-up-today): Short-term Bitcoin outlook and prediction.
- [Bitcoin price prediction today](/q/bitcoin-price-prediction-today): Today's BTC forecast and key levels.
- [Will Ethereum go up today?](/q/will-ethereum-go-up-today): Short-term Ethereum outlook and prediction.
- [Ethereum price prediction today](/q/ethereum-price-prediction-today): Today's ETH forecast and key levels.
- [Will Solana go up today?](/q/will-solana-go-up-today): Short-term Solana outlook and prediction.
- [Best crypto to buy today](/market/best-crypto-to-buy-today): Curated list of top opportunities today.
- [Top crypto gainers today](/market/top-crypto-gainers-today): Biggest daily gainers and momentum leaders.
- [Next crypto to explode](/market/next-crypto-to-explode): High-potential tokens with strong narrative and momentum.
- [Is crypto going up today?](/market/is-crypto-going-up-today): Overall crypto market direction and bias.
- [Which crypto will go up today?](/market/which-crypto-will-go-up-today): Asset-specific upside predictions for today.
- [Cheap crypto to buy now](/market/cheap-crypto-to-buy-now): Low-cap and undervalued tokens with upside potential.
- [Best altcoins to buy](/market/best-altcoins-to-buy): Top altcoin picks across sectors.
- [Top meme coins](/market/top-meme-coins): Trending meme coins and community-driven tokens.
- [Top AI crypto tokens](/market/top-ai-crypto-tokens): Artificial intelligence and AI-agent crypto projects.
- [Crypto market prediction today](/market/crypto-market-prediction-today): Broad market forecast and key levels.

## Supported Blockchains
Ethereum, Solana, Bitcoin, BNB Chain, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche, TRON, Sui, Aptos, Near, Cosmos, TON

## Data Sources & Methodology
- Price data: Aggregated from CoinGecko, Binance, Coinbase, CoinMarketCap via Supabase edge functions
- Predictions: Proprietary AI model analyzing RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, volume trends, social sentiment, and whale activity
- Sentiment: Aggregated from Twitter/X, Reddit, Telegram, Fear & Greed Index
- On-chain: Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain whale transaction monitoring

## Update Frequency
- Live prices: Every 15 seconds
- AI predictions: Every 5 minutes (daily), 15 minutes (weekly), 30 minutes (monthly)
- Market data: Every 20 seconds
- News: Continuous

## Content Policy
All content on OracleBull is for educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice.
